unexpected_error: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
switch_level_desc: Choose the speed and scope of restart when switching profiles.
switch_level_1_desc: Restarts the entire Antigravity application. Slower (~17s), but guarantees a complete interface and session refresh.
switch_level_2_desc: Restarts only the language server process (language_server.exe). Fast (~5s). Keeps the open window and chat history!
switch_level_3_desc: Patches the language server to restart instantly. Blazing fast (~3s) switch time!
switch_level_4_desc: Optimized full restart. Force-kills background zombie processes instantly and closes GUI gracefully. Fast (~8s).
checking_status: Checking Antigravity and local storage status.
token_relogin_needed: Log in to account again in Antigravity
global_quota_title: Global Gemini Limits (Average of all accounts)
about_app_desc: A secure, desktop utility to manage and swap profiles in Antigravity 2.0.
dev_specs_desc: Technical and diagnostic details useful for developers.
no_active_account_desc: Select one of the saved profiles to set it as active.
antigravity_not_detected_desc: The application could not automatically locate the Antigravity editor. Please point to the installation directory in settings to enable profile switching.
empty_desc: Save the currently logged-in Antigravity profile to switch accounts later without losing history and settings.
empty_hint: Profile data remains locally on this computer.
settings_desc: Manage connection, plugin, and secure diagnostics.
server_desc: Connection of the plugin with the desktop app.
port_hint: Available locally only. Changing it may require reconnecting the plugin.
validation_port: Port must be a number between 1024 and 65535.
diagnostics_desc: Ready, anonymized report for reporting issues.
diagnostics_item3: Tokens and email addresses are omitted
privacy_desc: Account data remains on this computer.
privacy_note: Profiles are identified by a random UUID. Credentials do not enter the logs.
smart_switch_desc: Automatically switches to another profile with the highest limits when current limits are low.
smart_switch_hint: Automatically switches accounts when the 5h limit falls below 10% or the weekly limit falls below 5%. Switching is blocked if the Antigravity agent is actively working.
add_modal_desc: Create a new profile by logging in directly via Google OAuth in the browser.
add_modal_waiting_desc: Sign in to your Google account in the opened browser window. Click "Cancel" to abort.
add_modal_redirect: Upon confirmation, your system browser will open the official Google login page.
add_modal_name_hint: Name visible only locally in the Switcher and plugin.
add_modal_auto_activate: Automatically activate this account in Antigravity (closes and restarts processes)
add_modal_validation_len: Account name should be at least 2 characters long.
delete_modal_desc: Profile "{name}" and its local history will be permanently deleted.
delete_modal_warning: This operation cannot be undone. The active profile cannot be deleted.
confirm_modal_desc: Restarting the editor is required to switch the profile safely.
confirm_modal_warning: Make sure all files in Antigravity are saved. Unsaved changes may be lost.
progress_modal_desc: Preserving current account data and checking the new profile consistency.
progress_modal_caution: Do not close the application while switching.
recovery_desc: The operation was interrupted at step: {step}. Choose a safe way to continue before returning to the app.
recovery_resume_desc: Continue from a safe saved stage.
recovery_rollback_desc: Roll back the operation and reactivate "{name}".
recovery_security: Normal access remains blocked to protect profile data.
maintenance_wipe_desc: Removes all local profiles, settings, credentials, and WebView cache. The application will restart as a fresh installation.
maintenance_uninstall_desc: Removes all traces of the application from this machine: profile data, WebView cache, Windows registry keys, and deletes the application executable itself.
maintenance_confirm_wipe_title: Are you sure you want to wipe data?
maintenance_confirm_wipe_desc: This operation will delete all configured profiles and settings. The application will restart empty.
maintenance_confirm_uninstall_title: Are you sure you want to completely uninstall the app?
maintenance_confirm_uninstall_desc: The application will delete all its profiles, cache, Windows registry entries, and the executable itself. The application will immediately close and be deleted.
err_switch_create_failed: Failed to create account switch operation.
guide_desc: Explanation of the key concepts and mechanisms behind the application.
guide_smart_switch_body: This feature automatically swaps your active profile to another saved profile with the highest remaining Gemini API limits when the current profile's limits are running low. This process runs in the background and triggers when the 5-hour limit drops below 10% or the weekly limit falls below 5%. To avoid interrupting your workflow, switching is automatically blocked if the Antigravity agent is actively running a task.
guide_switch_modes_body:
Determines the speed and scope of the restart when switching profiles:
• Level 1 (Full Restart): Restarts the entire Antigravity 2.0 application. Slower (~17s), but guarantees a complete interface and session refresh.
• Level 1+ (Optimized Restart): Optimized full restart (~8s). Force-kills zombie language servers instantly to free up database locks and closes the GUI gracefully.
• Level 2 (Reload): Restarts only the background language server process (language_server.exe). Fast (~5s) and keeps the open window and chat history intact.
• Level 2+ (Fast Reload): Blazing fast profile switching (~3s) by patching the language server to restart instantly.
guide_auth_refresh_body: The 'Valid (auto-refreshed)' status indicates that the application is managing the validity of your Google sessions in the background. The Switcher automatically renews authentication tokens before they expire using secure local mechanisms. This prevents you from having to re-authenticate via browser every time you switch accounts.
guide_mini_mode_body: A compact version of the application that can be pinned on top of other windows (Always on Top). It provides a simplified interface for instant, one-click profile switching without having to open the full control panel.
err_operation_in_progress: Switching operation is already in progress.
err_no_active_profile: No active profile; please import the current session first (use the 'Save current session' button).
err_recovery_required: Recovery of the previous operation is required.
err_confirmation_required: Antigravity is still running and requires confirmation to close.
err_credential_unavailable: Cannot read Antigravity credentials. Please make sure you are logged in to Antigravity.
err_missing_active_data: Missing required active session data (you might not be logged in to Antigravity yet): {path}
err_cross_volume: Paths are not on the same volume.
err_webview2_prompt:
This application requires the Microsoft Edge WebView2 Runtime to function properly.

Would you like to download and install it now?
err_webview2_dl_msg: Downloading WebView2 installer in the background. Please wait for the official installer to launch...
err_webview2_fail_msg: WebView2 installation was cancelled or failed. The application will close.
err_webview2_missing_msg: WebView2 Runtime was not detected even after running the installer. The application will close.
err_single_instance_msg: Another instance of Antigravity Account Switcher is already running.
err_oauth_token: Missing access token (access_token) in OAuth response.
err_oauth_id: Missing identity token (id_token) in OAuth response.
err_duplicate_account: Account {email} is already registered. Please delete the existing profile first.
